## Standards Checklist

Review each item against `standards/backend-node.md`. Items marked **required** should be
addressed before the project is considered standards-compliant.

### Project Structure (§1)

- [ ] Entry directory present (src/, server/, or app/) — `{{CHECK_ENTRY_DIR}}`
- [ ] (Manual) Directory layout follows expected structure for the chosen framework

### TypeScript (§3)

- [ ] TypeScript configured — `{{CHECK_TYPESCRIPT}}`
- [ ] (Manual) Strict mode enabled in tsconfig

### Error Handling (§4)

- [ ] (Manual) Centralized error handler present
- [ ] (Manual) Error responses use appropriate HTTP status codes
- [ ] (Manual) Stack traces not exposed in production responses

### Validation (§5)

- [ ] (Manual) Input validation present at request boundaries (Zod, Joi, or class-validator)

### Testing (§8)

- [ ] Test tooling present — `{{CHECK_TESTING}}`
- [ ] (Manual) Integration tests present for at least critical routes

### Configuration Management (§9)

- [ ] Env example file present — `{{CHECK_ENV_EXAMPLE}}`
- [ ] (Manual) No secrets committed; .env is gitignored

### Tooling (§12)

- [ ] ESLint configured — `{{CHECK_LINTING}}`
- [ ] Prettier configured — `{{CHECK_FORMATTING}}`

### Framework

- [ ] Framework detected — `{{CHECK_FRAMEWORK}}`
- [ ] (Manual) Framework version is current / not EOL

### Documentation & Hygiene

- [ ] README.md present — `{{CHECK_README}}`
- [ ] .gitignore present — `{{CHECK_GITIGNORE}}`
